title: selenicereus purpusii
intro: Selenicereus purpusii, a type of cactus native to Mexico, is a species of flowering cactus in the genus Selenicereus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Selenicereus purpusii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered internally to treat various health conditions.
